description:
A processing component that analyzes documents to extract a dictionary of 
key terms and phrases. It identifies domain-specific vocabulary, recurring 
expressions, and relevant terminology, building a structured list for downstream 
enrichment or reference. Useful for creating glossaries, supporting classification, 
or enhancing search relevance, the component helps surface important language patterns 
from unstructured content.

output.description: Outputs a series of documents, each one containing a dictionary item.

llm.description: LLM to use for Dictionary creation

title: Dictionary
